Auto Parts Fitment Explorer

What fits your ride?

Find your vehicle, add your year, and see which part categories have replacement coverage — broken down by engine and the exact model years each one fits.
What this is: a fitment reference built from a real aftermarket catalog (parts mapped to vehicles using the industry-standard AutoCare VCdb). It answers "does a replacement part for this category exist for my exact vehicle and year, and which engine does it fit?"
What it isn't: a price guide or a place to buy. It won't tell you cost, brand, or a specific part number — coverage, engines, and years only. Engine is shown when the catalog specifies it; "All engines" means the part wasn't split by engine. The Shop links open a search for your vehicle on third-party sites — they're starting points, not confirmed-fit results or endorsements. Always confirm exact fitment with a retailer before buying.

Brake job — pads, rotors, calipers4
Disc Brake Pad Set
1997–2003 · 24 apps
Pad materialCeramicSemi-Metallic
Ceramic runs quieter and makes less brake dust — good for everyday driving. Semi-metallic bites harder and shrugs off heat better — good for towing, hills, or heavier vehicles. Match what your car came with if you’re unsure.
